title: BANKERS BOX 4x 10L Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids. ProStore Super Strong Stackable Plastic Storage Boxes (14 x 34 x 21.5cm), Made in the UK, Clear
features: LONG LASTING: Built to last, these strong plastic storage boxes with lids are made from impact resistant polypropylene that is fully recyclable
REINFORCED BASE & CORNERS: Maximise your floor space with these plastic storage boxes which are strong enough to stack thanks to the double reinforced base and corners
SECURE CLAMPS: Keep the contents of your ProStore plastic storage box dust and moisture free, clip-lock clamps securely lock the lid tightly in place
IDEAL FOR STORING DOCUMENTS: These plastic storage boxes with lids are ideal for the storage of A4 paper – will hold 2 full reams of 80gsm paper. Internal dimensions (HxWxD): 14 x 34 x 21.5cm
100% BPA FREE: All ProStore plastic storage boxes are 100% BPA free, certified as food approved and are fully recyclable, including packaging
MADE IN THE UK: ProStore storage boxes are made in the UK
